name: gamekeeper-workspace

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gamekeeper/core run build && pnpm --filter @gamekeeper/cli run build
scripts.ui: concurrently --names server,web --prefix-colors blue,green "pnpm --filter @gamekeeper/server run dev" "pnpm --filter web run dev"

author: Diego Pinto dos Santos
description: Personal game library aggregator focused on visibility and decision-making
